channel.title: The Interview (archive)
channel.description: Episodes preserved from a Wayback Machine snapshot of the show's feed; audio streams from the original publisher CDN.

item.title: Seth Rogen Knows the Secret to Marriage — and Being Rich in Hollywood
item.description:
The actor-writer-director-producer on successful relationships (platonic and romantic), Hollywood’s volatility and his role in normalizing weed.

  • Thoughts? Email us at theinterview@nytimes.com
  • Watch our show on YouTube: youtube.com/@TheInterviewPodcast
  • For transcripts and more, visit: nytimes.com/theinterview

Hosted by Simplecast, an AdsWizz company. See pcm.adswizz.com for information about our collection and use of personal data for advertising.
item.author: jeffrey.miranda@nytimes.com (The New York Times)
item.content:encoded:
The actor-writer-director-producer on successful relationships (platonic and romantic), Hollywood’s volatility and his role in normalizing weed.

  • Thoughts? Email us at theinterview@nytimes.com
  • Watch our show on YouTube: youtube.com/@TheInterviewPodcast
  • For transcripts and more, visit: nytimes.com/theinterview

Hosted by Simplecast, an AdsWizz company. See pcm.adswizz.com for information about our collection and use of personal data for advertising.

item.itunes:author: The New York Times
item.itunes:summary: The actor-writer-director-producer on successful relationships (platonic and romantic), Hollywood’s volatility and his role in normalizing weed.

item.title: Scott Pelley on His Firing and the ‘Massacre’ at ’60 Minutes’
item.description:
An exclusive sit-down with the now-former CBS News correspondent.

  • Thoughts? Email us at theinterview@nytimes.com
  • Watch our show on YouTube: youtube.com/@TheInterviewPodcast
  • For transcripts and more, visit: nytimes.com/theinterview

Hosted by Simplecast, an AdsWizz company. See pcm.adswizz.com for information about our collection and use of personal data for advertising.
